nasb.text: If your father misses me at all, then say, ‘David earnestly asked leave of me to run to Bethlehem his city, because it is the yearly sacrifice there for the whole family.’

esv.text: If your father misses me at all, then say, ‘David earnestly asked leave of me to run to Bethlehem his city, for there is a yearly sacrifice there for all the clan.’

cnv.text: 如果你父親不見我在座，你就說：‘大衛懇求我讓他趕回他的本城伯利恆去，因為他全家在那裡有獻年祭的事。’

ccb.text: 如果你父亲问起我，你就说我恳求你允许我回到故乡伯利恒，因为我全家正在那里献年祭。
